title: Japanese Chicken Skewers with Miso Glaze
description: Sweet and savory Japanese-inspired skewers with a sticky miso glaze. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner or a summer barbecue.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, and sake until smooth.
Add the sliced green onions to the bowl and mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sesame oil and sesame seeds (if using).
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the miso glaze onto both sides of the chicken.
Brush the sesame oil mixture onto both sides of the chicken.
Grill the skewers over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
